---
name: setup
description: Inject subagent delegation rules into the project CLAUDE.md
---

# Subagent Setup

Detect installed subagent plugins and inject their delegation rules into the project's `CLAUDE.md`.

## Steps

1. **Read the project CLAUDE.md** — read `CLAUDE.md` at the project root (create it if it doesn't exist)

2. **Check existing section** — if a `## Delegation` section already exists, remove it entirely (it will be regenerated)

3. **Generate the delegation block** — use this exact format:

```markdown
## Delegation

<!-- Generated by /setup — do not edit manually -->

| Service | Mode | Delegate to |
|---------|------|-------------|
| **Linear** (`mcp__plugin_linear_linear__*`) | `Agent` | `multi-agents:Linear` |
| **Notion** (`mcp__plugin_Notion_notion__*`) | `Agent` | `multi-agents:Notion` |
| **Git & GitHub** (commits, PRs, issues, checks, releases) | `Agent` | `multi-agents:Git` |
| **Slack** (`mcp__plugin_slack_slack__*`) | `Agent` | `multi-agents:Slack` |
| **Archivist** (RAG memory, knowledge indexing & search) | `Agent` | `multi-agents:Archivist` |
| **Code Review** (PR review, quality, security, architecture) | `Skill` | `/pr-review` |
| **Kanban** (task management, AI pipeline, board) | `Skill` | `/kanban`, `/kanban-run`, `/kanban-refine` |

**Need the result in your context → call directly. Otherwise → delegate.**

**`resume`**: `Agent(subagent_type="...", resume="<agentId>", prompt="...")` to follow up without re-fetching.

### Archivage continu

Après chaque tâche complétée (PR, bugfix, refactor, feature, réponse à une question technique), déléguer en background à `multi-agents:Archivist` un résumé de ce sur quoi l'utilisateur travaille.

Prompt type : `"Index activity: working on [sujet] in [repo/projet]. Context: [résumé concis de la tâche]."`

Règles :
- Toujours en background (`run_in_background: true`)
- Ne jamais bloquer le flux principal
```

4. **Write the block** — insert the `## Delegation` section in the project CLAUDE.md (append at end, or replace if it already existed). If a `## Delegation` section already existed, also check for and remove any standalone `## Archivage` sections (they are now part of Delegation).

5. **Report** — confirm to the user that the delegation rules were added.
